response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX/embedded environments, no evidence of Linux kernel modification or embedded networking security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), and no Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement. His background is predominantly in web, mobile, and full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript systems, with minimal exposure to embedded firmware or network switch development.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and contribute to open-source tools
Experience with Linux systems and low-latency application design
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded/UNIX contexts as required
No exposure to LAN-switch security protocols or embedded firmware development
Japanese language proficiency is absent, violating a core requirement
